planning.acceptanceCriteria: Tenant list, show, upsert, lifecycle, permission, API, screen, database, and planning records are mapped.
planning.blockers: Missing ownership or route coverage should be raised as Work & Automation issues.
planning.name: Complete tenant registry coverage
planning.richNotes: Track list, show, upsert, lifecycle, permission, API, screen, and table coverage for Tenant.
planning.validationPlan: Run focused tenant and platform registry checks after each coverage update.

planning.acceptanceCriteria: Users has tenant menu route, permissions, APIs, screens, database fields, audit events, tests, and lifecycle behavior documented.
planning.blockers: Confirm service/controller implementation status before marking ready.
planning.name: Users coverage plan
planning.richNotes: Users belongs to the tenant Master Contacts group and must stay on route /tenant/foundation/users with plural kebab-case route and registry keys.
planning.validationPlan: Run tenant Foundation registry checks and focused users API/screen tests when implementation is added.

release.command: npm run version:bump -- --title "Tenant Registry Module Wiring" --no-database-update
release.description: Released tenant registry module wiring with Foundation, Master, Common, Business, and Platform App menu coverage plus generic backend/frontend module persistence.
release.richNotes: Version `1.0.60` has no database migrations or schema updates. Verification covered core, platform API, platform web typechecks, and tenant module Playwright e2e.
release.title: Tenant Registry Module Wiring
